2016 ISDA Credit Support Annex for Variation Margin
(Title Transfer – English Law)

Dated: June 15, 2023
Party A: Vertex Asset Management plc
Party B: Horizon Bank PLC (LEI: 213800MBWEIJDM5CU638)

Paragraph 13. Elections

(a) Base Currency: USD

(b) Threshold.
    Party A Threshold: USD 0.
    Party B Threshold: USD 0.
    (This CSA is a Regulatory CSA under the EMIR Variation Margin rules.)

(c) Minimum Transfer Amount.
    Party A MTA: USD 1,000,000.
    Party B MTA: USD 1,000,000.
    Rounding: to the nearest USD 1,000.

(d) Eligible Currencies.
    USD, EUR, and GBP shall be Eligible Currencies for cash collateral.
    Securities shall not constitute Eligible Credit Support under this Annex.

(e) Interest on Cash Collateral.
    USD: SOFR – 5 basis points.
    EUR: €STR – 5 basis points.
    GBP: SONIA – 5 basis points.
    Interest amounts shall be netted against margin transfers.

(f) Valuation Agent.
    Party B shall act as Valuation Agent.
    Valuation Time: 4:00 PM London time on each Valuation Date.

(g) Settlement Day.
    Transfers of Eligible Credit Support shall settle on T+1 Business Day.

(h) Close-out Netting.
    Close-out netting pursuant to the ISDA Master Agreement shall apply
    to all Transactions covered by this Annex.

(i) Covered Transactions.
    This Annex covers all OTC derivative Transactions entered into under
    the ISDA Master Agreement between the parties.

Governing law: English law.
